Get practices

Source: R/get-practices.R
get_practices.Rd

Queries the practices table, with options to add descriptive labels for the setting and status_code columns and to filter by those columns. Labels are defined in the practice_settings and practice_statuses lookup tables.

Usage

get_practices(
  con,
  add_setting_labels = FALSE,
  filter_setting = NULL,
  add_status_code_labels = FALSE,
  filter_status_code = NULL
)

Arguments

con

A BigQuery connection from connect_bq().

add_setting_labels

Logical, add a setting_label column describing the practice setting code. Default FALSE.

filter_setting

Integer vector of setting codes to keep, e.g. 4 for standard GP practices. Default NULL (no filter). See practice_settings.

add_status_code_labels

Logical, add a status_code_label column describing the practice status code. Default FALSE.

filter_status_code

Character vector of status codes to keep, e.g. "A" for active practices. Default NULL (no filter). See practice_statuses.

Value

A query (tbl) of the practices table, to be downloaded with dplyr::collect().

Details

The result is a query, not data: nothing is downloaded until you call dplyr::collect(), and you can add further dplyr steps first.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
con <- connect_bq()

# All practices, unfiltered
get_practices(con)

# Standard GP practices with labels, downloaded into R
gp_practices <- get_practices(
  con,
  add_setting_labels = TRUE,
  filter_setting = 4
) |>
  dplyr::collect()
} # }
